HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PETER TOGIAI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. PETER TOGIAI HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN.
